narrative:
Pierce Twp township has 11,749 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
